CustomField.description: JSON expression that decides whether a Form_Answer for this catalog entry passes. Same shape as Form_Question__c.Conditions__c — { "all": [{ resource, operator, value }] } / { "any": [...] } — interpreted server-side by NeuraFormScoringEvaluator. The new "self" resource keyword refers to this answer's own value; existing external_ref keywords reference other answers in the same Linked_Form. Null Pass_Criteria__c means the question is informational and Passed__c stays null. See docs/phase-2-pillar-5-scoring-findings.md.
CustomField.label: Pass Criteria
